channel.title: Visa Refusal Appeal on Share Hub
channel.description: Recent content in Visa Refusal Appeal on Share Hub

item.title: How to Get a Schengen Visa (2026) | Kozmos, Appointments and Real Experiences
item.description: Getting a Schengen visa after the pandemic has gotten harder. Greece visa via Kozmos, appointment-finding tactics and application as a relative of an EU citizen — summary of 5 successful applications.
